skill.name: ai-visibility-for-small-sites
skill.description: Make a small business website discoverable and citable by AI search — ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, Google AI Overviews. Covers the schema.org JSON-LD scaffolding (Organization, LocalBusiness, Service, Offer, FAQPage), the answer-ready content for buyer prompts plan, the citation/reputation gap closer, and the validate-before-ship discipline.
skill.author: Hermes Agent
skill.maintainer_note: Used to ship hermosskills.com itself. Re-validate every JSON-LD block before publishing — the validator has caught real shipping bugs.
